title: phyllanthus gladiatus
intro: Phyllanthus gladiatus, also known as the Gladius tree or Cheesewood, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Phyllanthus gladiatus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
